preferences.raw_input: Weekend getaway to Coorg from Bangalore. 2 days, budget ₹8,000. Love nature, coffee estates, trekking. Solo trip.

selected_option.label: A
cons: Weather can be misty — pack layers

categories.description: Zostel Coorg or OYO budget homestay
Pandi curry, Akki roti, filter coffee
Mandalpatti jeep safari, Abbey Falls, coffee estate tour

budget_breakdown.optimization_notes: Used KSRTC bus instead of Cab (saves ₹2,000). Chose budget homestay. Main splurge: Mandalpatti jeep safari which is the highlight of Coorg.

transport_booking.name: KSRTC Airavata Gold / Club Class
transport_booking.description: Bangalore Majestic → Madikeri (Coorg). Comfortable overnight or morning bus.
transport_booking.notes: Book 3-4 days ahead. Departs Majestic at 8 PM (overnight) or 6 AM (day). Return: 5 PM Sunday.

hotel_booking.name: Zostel Coorg / Mountain Valley Homestay
hotel_booking.description: Budget homestay or hostel in Madikeri town with breakfast, wifi, and great Coorg views
hotel_booking.notes: Homestays include authentic Coorg breakfast (akki roti + pandi curry). Book early.

activity_bookings.name: Mandalpatti Peak Jeep Safari
activity_bookings.description: Epic 4×4 jeep ride through coffee estates to 1,736m Mandalpatti peak with misty valley views
activity_bookings.notes: Shared jeep ₹800. Best in early morning for clear valley views.

activity_bookings.name: Abbey Falls + Coffee Estate Walk
activity_bookings.description: Stunning 70ft waterfall surrounded by coffee and spice plantations. Estate walk with tasting.
activity_bookings.notes: Entry ₹30 + ₹300 coffee estate tour fee. Buy fresh Coorg coffee powder here!

blocks.description: KSRTC bus from Majestic. Scenic ghats drive through Western Ghats. Arrive Madikeri.
blocks.tips: Carry motion sickness tab for ghat section. Book window seat.

blocks.description: Check in to homestay. Taste authentic Coorg lunch – pandi curry (pork), rice, akki roti, tambli
blocks.tips: Ask the homestay host for local recommendations – they're the best guides.

blocks.description: Rent a bike (₹500) and ride 8 km to Abbey Falls. Walk through a working coffee estate, see the harvest process, taste fresh-brewed Coorg coffee.
blocks.tips: Go early afternoon. Buy Coorg honey and pepper from the estate shop.

blocks.description: Famous garden where Coorg kings watched sunsets. Panoramic view of valleys and hills turning golden.
blocks.tips: Entry ₹10. Arrive 20 mins before sunset for best light.

blocks.description: Try the famous Coorg thali at East End Restaurant – bamboo shoot curry, fish curry, payasam dessert
blocks.tips: The bamboo shoot curry is Coorg's signature dish. Must try!

blocks.description: Quick homestay breakfast – idli, filter coffee, banana. Pack snacks for the trek.
blocks.tips: Start early for clear views before mist sets in!

blocks.description: 4×4 jeep from Bhagamandala through coffee estate trails to Mandalpatti peak. Short 30-min hike to summit viewpoint. 360° misty valley views.
blocks.tips: Shared jeep from Bhagamandala (25 km from Madikeri). Carry a jacket — 1,736m can be cold!

blocks.description: Visit the sacred Bhagamandala temple + Cauvery river origin or take a quick dip at Iruppu Falls
blocks.tips: Remove shoes at temple. Iruppu Falls entry ₹30.

blocks.description: Local restaurant for kadambuttu (rice dumplings) or noolputtu fish curry
blocks.tips: Buy Coorg Robusta coffee beans (₹200-300 for 250gm) before leaving!

blocks.description: KSRTC bus from Madikeri to Bangalore Majestic. Scenic sunset drive through the Ghats.
blocks.tips: 5 PM bus ideal. Pre-book return ticket.

booking_checklist: Book KSRTC bus Bangalore → Madikeri (redbus.in or KSRTC app)
Book return bus Madikeri → Bangalore for Sunday 5 PM
Reserve homestay in Madikeri (Zostel Coorg or Airbnb)
Book Mandalpatti jeep safari online (or at Bhagamandala jeep stand)
Rent a bike in Madikeri for Abbey Falls (₹500/day without fuel)
insider_tips: Coorg receives heavy rainfall July–September — avoid monsoon for this trip
Mandalpatti views are clearest October–February before 9 AM
Buy authentic Coorg honey, pepper, and coffee at estate shops — not tourist traps
The bike rental in Madikeri town is best from the shops near the main market
Cell signal is poor in interior Coorg — download offline Google Maps before going
weather_summary: Pleasant and cool year-round. 15-22°C in hills. Light mist in mornings. Carry light jacket and raincoat (just in case).
